rows.bio: Ypsilanti artist Duffle Cole is back and hungrier than ever after serving a 4-year prison sentence. Fresh home and locked in, Cole is ready to make his mark on the Michigan music scene with raw, authentic street narratives that only someone who lived it can tell.
